texto: It has been said that if you have Zen in your life,you have no fear, no doubt, no unnecessary craving, no extreme emotions. Neither illiberal attitudes nor egotistical actions trouble you. You serve humanity humbly, fulfilling your presence in this world with loving-kindness and observing your passing as a petal falling from a flower. Serene, you enjoy life in blissful tranquility. Such is the spirit of Zen.---Zen flesh, Zen bones.
explicacao: Citação de Paul sobre enfrentar incertezas com ação. “It has been said that if you have Zen in your life,you have no fear, no doubt, no unnecessary cra…” articula reflexao, zen, doubt em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
